ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR HEARING ON EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER OF CLARIFICATION AND SANCTIONS HEARING SET FOR JUL-19-2002 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, HEARING ON EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER OF CLARIFICATION AND SANCTIONS. MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. THE COURT VACATED ITS PREVIOUS ORDER. THE COURT ORDERED MR. ORTEGA TO DRAFT AN ORDER AND DELIVER IT BY 1:30 P.M. TODAY WHICH SPECIFICALLY IDENTIFIES HIS CLIENT'S RIGHT TO GO TO THE BUILDING ACCOMPANIED TO RETRIEVE PROPERTY AND THAT SHALL BE ACCOMPLISHED ON OR BEFORE 4:00 P.M. JULY 25TH. MR. PEERY'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855

calendar.matters:
Hearing On Ex Parte Application For Order Of Clarification And Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-19-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: 11:00 A.M. EX-PARTE MATTER
APPEARANCES:
Amit Peery, Esq. 818/995-4079 for Plaintiff 490 Post Street Associates applying to the Court to clarify its previous ex-parte order and requesting sanctions (Gil Peled of PEERY & ASSOCIATES 818/995-4079 also present)
Rocky Ortega, Esq. 922-4529 for defendant MART S. ABATE, D.D.S. opposing party
(Martin S. Abate, D.D.S. also present in court)
* The Court vacated its previous order. The Court ordered Mr. Ortega to draft an order and deliver it by 1:30 p.m. today which specifically identifies his client's right to go to the building accompanied to retrieve property and that shall be accomplished on or before 4:00 p.m. July 25th. Mr. Peery's request for sanctions denied. Order signed in open court. (JJM/kh) Reporter: Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-06-2002 Off Calendar
